description: I have identified the job listing page for the 'Junior Software Developer' position. To proceed with the application, the next logical step is to click the 'Apply' button, which is typically located on such pages (though not explicitly visible in the cropped area of the screenshot, standard UX for these pages dictates finding the Apply button to begin the flow).
A cookie consent banner is blocking interaction with the page, including the primary 'Apply' button. This must be dismissed first.
A cookie consent overlay is blocking interaction with the page. I must click 'Accept All Cookies' to proceed with the job application flow.
The page has a modal overlay requesting cookie consent. This must be accepted before any other interactions with the job application page are possible.
